---
title: "Work With Me"
subtitle: "Enterprise data platforms, warehouse optimization, AI agents, time series"
description: "Get in touch about migration assurance, warehouse cost and performance work, analytics automation with AI agents, or time series."
toc: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

I work with enterprise data teams on problems where the gap between "we have data" and "we trust the data" is costing real money — migrations that stall, warehouses that overspend, analytics workflows that depend on manual notebook runs, or telemetry pipelines that need ML but lack the in-house depth.

## What a typical engagement looks like

**Advisory** — A few sessions to scope a problem, review architecture, or pressure-test a migration plan. Good for teams that have the people but need a second opinion from someone who has done it before.

**Embedded principal** — I join your team for weeks or months as an interim lead or senior IC. I own deliverables, coordinate with stakeholders, and ship production work. This is how most of my enterprise engagements run.

**Hands-on implementation** — I build the thing: validation frameworks, optimization benchmarks, coding-agent workflows, time series models. I write code, not slide decks.

## Good fit

- You are migrating between data platforms and need systematic validation, not spot-checks.
- Your warehouse costs are growing faster than your data and you need someone to profile, benchmark, and fix it.
- You want to use coding agents for real engineering work (not demos) and need someone who has shipped with them.
- You have telemetry, sensor, or time series data and need production ML — not a research paper.
- You need an interim team lead who can own a roadmap, manage stakeholders, and still write code.

## Get in touch

[Email me](mailto:farrukh.nauman@inertialrange.com){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[Connect on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fnauman/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg}

I usually reply within 1–2 business days. If you reach out, a line or two on what you are working on helps me prepare a useful first response:

::: {.intake-topics .mt-3}
`migration` · `warehouse cost` · `analytics automation` · `AI agents` · `time series` · `interim leadership` · `something else`
:::
